---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new assessment query or workbook enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. e.g., "The workbook doesn't assess..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear description of the new query or enhancement.

**Proposed query (if applicable)**
```kql
resources
| where type == '...'
| project name, ...
```

**Pillar**
Which pillar does this belong to?
- [ ] Data Management & Governance
- [ ] Retrieval & Context Enablement
- [ ] Model Management
- [ ] Responsible AI
- [ ] Security & Compliance
- [ ] Monitoring & Operations

**Additional context**
Add any other context, screenshots, or references.
